title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: How do you try to stay healthy in your daily life?
Do you think people today are more or less healthy than fifty years ago?
What do you do to manage stress in your life?
Are there any types of food you try to avoid? Why?
How important is it to you to get enough sleep?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think mental health is given as much attention as physical health?
Should employers be responsible for the health and wellbeing of their staff?
Is there something you could do to improve your health that you haven't started yet?
